lane.title: 10 Packaging Design
lane.last_task: Build NCH flask front/back editable Figma review board
lane.last_summary: Ingested updated packaging-design context and built a self-contained Figma approval page in existing file cNkjzNFs4Xb1bdJUBB0Xey. Locked approved front reference and v5 back reference are nested into their frames. Editable back v6 frame now contains matched embroidered background, larger emblem, dual QR cards, Instagram/website/phone/statutory text, divider, and dark footer band. Source front/back PDFs still qpdf pass at 136x216mm; source QR PNGs decode to /go/flask and Google review. No final vendor dieline bulk generation done before approval.
lane.next_action: Have Nihaf review page 'Codex Final 250ml Front Back Editable' in Figma, adjust editable back placements if needed, then run deterministic SVG/PDF/QR/bleed/dieline vendor checks after panel approval.
lane.mutation_status: Existing Figma file mutation only; no POS/Odoo/ad/WABA/vendor final file mutation; no bulk final dielines generated.

recent_events.task: Audit Figma MCP control for NCH flask file
recent_events.summary: Confirmed existing Figma flask file cNkjzNFs4Xb1bdJUBB0Xey is accessible and writable: metadata read for node 1:7, created Codex MCP Control Test page/nodes, uploaded a PNG as a new Figma image node, exported screenshots and downloaded them. New blank file creation failed earlier due invalid planKey; direct upload-to-existing-node fill did not apply, but upload-as-new-node works and can be positioned/resized by use_figma.
recent_events.next_action: Build final front/back editable panels inside existing NCH flask Figma file using existing page/node 1:7; use supported Figma fonts like Cinzel/Cormorant/Inter and upload raster references as new image nodes.

recent_events.task: Refine NCH 250ml flask back aesthetic with Gemini-guided dual QR system
recent_events.summary: Built v5 Gemini-refined NCH 250ml flask back production candidate at /Users/nihaf/Downloads/NCH_Flask_Back_Production_2026-05-25_v5_GeminiRefined: larger NCH emblem, simplified premium hierarchy, WhatsApp dynamic QR plus Google review QR, Instagram identity line, dark sepia legal footer, front-matched kraft/border system, and Gemini nano-banana-pro-preview concept reference. Verified qpdf, PDF page size 136x216mm, and zbar decoding of both QRs.
recent_events.next_action: Confirm phone/legal/FSSAI and live /go/flask redirect, then assemble front+back into full 250ml vendor dieline with side/gable panels.
recent_events.mutation_status: Created local print/proof assets and Gemini concept only; no POS/Odoo/ad/vendor mutation.

recent_events.task: Construct NCH 250ml flask back panel from finalized front reference
recent_events.summary: Built a scratch v2 back-panel production pack using the finalized front kraft/border system and supplied back reference: matched background fill, NCH emblem, gift message, QR, WhatsApp phone, and legal copy; exported 136x216mm PDF/SVG plus preview/proof files in /Users/nihaf/Downloads/NCH_Flask_Back_Production_2026-05-25; qpdf and pdfinfo checks passed.
recent_events.next_action: Review the back v2 preview/proof, confirm legal copy and QR destination, then assemble front+back+side/tuck dieline vendor handoff.
recent_events.mutation_status: Created local print/proof assets only; no POS/Odoo/ad/vendor mutation.

recent_events.summary: Converted the supplied exact NCH 250ml front SVG into a clean production-friendly front panel without redesigning it. Extracted the embedded high-resolution artwork, removed the malformed Figma/base64 wrapper plus measurement labels/crop marks/colored guide strokes, and rebuilt valid 136mm x 216mm front-panel SVG/PDF for 130x210mm trim plus 3mm bleed. Verified PDF page size is 385.512 x 612.283 pt and qpdf reports no syntax/stream errors. Copied production pack to /Users/nihaf/Downloads/NCH_Flask_Front_Production_2026-05-25.
recent_events.next_action: Use the clean front panel as the locked approved front. Next build the matching 250ml back panel from the same visual system, but first confirm legal copy, FSSAI, phone, ingredients, and /go/flask QR redirect target. After front/back approval, build spines/gables and assemble onto the unfolded dieline.
recent_events.mutation_status: Created local print assets only: production PDF/SVG, extracted JPG, preview PNG, proof-with-guides, manifest and README. No website, POS/Odoo, ad, WABA, aggregator, or vendor send mutation.

recent_events.summary: Analyzed NCH flask macro objective and current source files. The project objective is vendor-printable flat unfolded carton PDFs for 250ml and 500ml, not generative mockups. Current supplied front SVG is 9.9MB Figma-style SVG with embedded raster artwork plus visible measurement/dieline marks; rsvg-convert fails XML parse on it, so it must be normalized/extracted before production use. Dieline zip contains two compact unfolded dieline SVGs. Existing _flask_bg assets include locked 2748x4096 front/back bases, vector wordmark/filigree/endcap, QR SVG, deterministic scripts, and reference-match output PDFs that qpdf validates but still carry placeholder legal/QR decisions.
recent_events.next_action: Exact next step: build a canonical NCH flask production board by normalizing the new 250ml front SVG and dieline zip into clean panel assets, then produce one approval proof for the 250ml front panel only: no measurement marks, no printed kraft texture, brand artwork aligned to 130x210mm plus 3mm bleed. Use Figma MCP only for visual approval/canvas if helpful; use deterministic Python/rsvg/PDF tools for final vendor files. Gemini API can generate mockups/review previews, not final print panels.
recent_events.mutation_status: Read-only analysis and memory sync only. No artwork, vendor output, website, POS, ad, WABA, or aggregator mutation.
